subject: Only open if you own a business and want to scale
body:
Hey,

If you're a business owner... And you're interested in scaling your business...

You might like this:

We're getting together for a couple of days at our new HQ in Las Vegas with an exclusive group of business owners.

Over two days, we will show you how we scale companies using the theory of constraints model along with several other tools we've used to great success to build our 500+ million portfolio.

As a new subscriber (and to say thank you for opting in), I wanted to send this email to extend a private invitation - to see if you would like to apply below and attend.

See you soon,

Leila

P.S. - For everyone else, Alex has plenty of value he's about to send your way.
